prediction.reasoning: The price prediction for MS in 18 days was generated using a Monte Carlo simulation based on the Geometric Brownian Motion (GBM) model. We started with the current price of $166.80. Historical data for MS over the past year was used to estimate the daily drift (mean logarithmic return) and daily volatility (standard deviation of logarithmic returns). For this simulation, an approximate daily drift of 0.0008 (equivalent to ~22% annual return) and a daily volatility of 0.01386 (equivalent to ~22% annual volatility) were used. The simulation ran 50,000 potential price paths over the 18-day period. The point estimate is the median of these simulated final prices, and the confidence intervals represent the corresponding percentiles (25th-75th for 50% CI, 10th-90th for 80% CI, and 5th-95th for 90% CI) of the distribution of these simulated final prices.
